name: Grape Nut Bread - Small
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the bread machine to the basic setting.
2. Add the water, applesauce, sugar, and salt into the bread machine pan.
3. Place the grape nuts into the bread machine pan.
4. Select the quick bread cycle and start the machine.
5. When the cycle is complete, turn off the bread machine and let it cool for a few minutes before removing the loaf.
